    O

    onFinish - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.timer.GameTimer
    Callback invoked when the timer reaches zero.
    onHandelValidate(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.game.GameController
    Handles the validate button action and Enter key press from the text field.
    onHandelValidate(ActionEvent) - Method in interface com.example.escriturarapida.controller.game.IGameController
    Handles the validation of the word typed by the player.
    onHandleExit(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.result.FinalController
    Handles the exit button action.
    onHandleExit(ActionEvent) - Method in interface com.example.escriturarapida.controller.result.IFinalController
    Handles the action to exit to the welcome screen.
    onHandleKeyPressed(KeyEvent) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.result.FinalController
    Handles key press events on the final screen.
    onHandleRestart(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.result.FinalController
    Handles the restart button action.
    onHandleRestart(ActionEvent) - Method in interface com.example.escriturarapida.controller.result.IFinalController
    Handles the action to restart the game from the beginning.
    onHandleStart(ActionEvent) - Method in interface com.example.escriturarapida.controller.welcome.IWelcomeController
    Handles the action to start the game.
    onHandleStart(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.welcome.WelcomeController
    Handles the start button action.
    onTick - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.timer.GameTimer
    Optional callback invoked on every tick with the remaining time.
    overtime() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.game.GameController
    Handles the event triggered when the countdown timer reaches zero.
